personal.name: Francois Meiring
personal.title: Data Scientist & Software Developer
personal.description: Passionate about turning data into insight, building robust systems, and continuously pushing the boundaries of what I know.
personal.summary: Computer scientist and aspiring data scientist with a dual background in statistics and software engineering. Currently pursuing an MSc in Computer Science at North-West University, with research focused on astronomical data processing and distributed computing. My undergraduate degree in Computer Science and Statistics gave me a strong analytical foundation, which I complement with hands-on production experience building full-stack systems. I am drawn to roles where rigorous statistical thinking and engineering capability work together — whether that is building data pipelines, developing models, or extracting meaning from complex datasets. Outside of work, you will find me at the gym, on the squash court, or working through a guitar piece.

availability.message: Open to data science, data analysis, and research opportunities

donation.title: Support My Studies
donation.message: If you'd like to help me continue my education and learning journey, you can donate here. Any support means a lot to me!

experience.title: Junior Software Developer
experience.description: As a Junior Software Developer at Shareforce, I work within a structured team comprising senior, intermediate, and junior developers to maintain and enhance the company's main enterprise system. My responsibilities include resolving bugs, implementing improvements, and collaborating closely with experienced colleagues. Working alongside more senior developers has given me exposure to professional software practices and accelerated my growth as an engineer.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Developer
experience.description: Built the company's enterprise systems from the ground up as one of two junior developers on the project. Designed and developed an Environmental Management System (EMS), a partial Laboratory Information Management System (LIMS), and a project management system. The full-stack solution used React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend, with PostgreSQL as the primary database and Redis for caching. Object storage was handled via MinIO, while all source code and CI/CD pipelines were managed through GitHub. The stack was containerised with Docker and orchestrated using Kubernetes for production deployment.

experience.title: Shop Assistant
experience.description: Part-time retail position focused on customer service and sales, developing interpersonal communication skills and professional workplace etiquette.

experience.title: Waiter
experience.description: Food service position emphasising customer satisfaction, multitasking, and effective communication in a fast-paced environment.

education.details: Research-focused master's degree with emphasis on astronomical data processing and distributed computing systems.
Honours degree specialising in advanced software engineering and computational research methodologies.
Dual-major undergraduate degree combining computational theory with statistical analysis and data science fundamentals.
Subjects: Physics, Afrikaans Home Language, English First Additional Language, Mathematics, Information Technology, Computer Applications Technology.

projects.title: Francois0203 Portfolio Website
projects.subtitle: Modern React-Based Personal Portfolio & Professional Showcase
projects.description: A professionally designed personal portfolio website built with React, showcasing projects, skills, and experience through an interactive, responsive interface. Features a modern design system with theme switching, animated components, and optimized performance. The site demonstrates full-stack development capabilities, responsive design principles, and attention to user experience across all device types.
projects.summary: A modern, professionally-designed portfolio website showcasing technical skills, projects, and experience through an engaging, responsive interface.

features.title: Responsive Design System
features.description: Fully responsive layout that adapts seamlessly to desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Features a comprehensive theme system with light/dark mode switching and CSS custom properties for consistent styling across all components.

features.title: Interactive Components
features.description: Custom-built reusable React components including navigation, modals, tooltips, toast notifications, and form elements. Features smooth animations, ripple effects, and particle systems that adapt to device capabilities and user preferences.

features.title: Performance Optimized
features.description: Optimized for fast load times and smooth interactions with lazy loading, code splitting, and efficient rendering. Animations automatically reduce on mobile devices and respect user's motion preferences for accessibility.

features.title: GitHub Pages Deployment
features.description: Automated deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions, enabling seamless updates and continuous delivery. Hosted on GitHub Pages with custom domain support and HTTPS enforcement.

highlights: Designed and implemented complete UI/UX with modern design principles and accessibility in mind
Built reusable component library with consistent theming and responsive layouts
Implemented performance optimizations including lazy loading and reduced animations for mobile devices
Configured automated deployment pipeline for continuous delivery
Created interactive animations and effects that enhance user experience without compromising performance

projects.title: Telescope Correlator
projects.subtitle: Production-Ready FX Correlator for Radio Telescope Arrays
projects.description: A professional-grade telescope correlator implementing the FX architecture for processing radio telescope data. This system processes voltage streams from radio telescope antenna arrays and produces visibility data suitable for astronomical image synthesis. Designed for both development (simulation) and production (real telescope) operation modes, it represents a complete signal processing pipeline for radio astronomy applications.

features.title: FX Correlator Architecture
features.description: Implements the industry-standard FX correlation pipeline with F-Engine for channelisation via windowed FFT, X-Engine for cross-correlation and integration between antenna pairs, and geometric delay compensation accounting for array geometry and source position.

features.title: Dual Operation Modes
features.description: Features separate development and production modes. Development mode provides simulated telescope data for algorithm testing and validation. Production mode handles live network streaming (TCP/UDP) and file processing from real telescope arrays with monitoring, quality checks, and calibration support.

features.title: Network Data Streaming
features.description: Real-time processing of telescope data streams via TCP/UDP protocols with configurable buffer management, timeout handling, and quality monitoring. Supports live correlation of data from antenna arrays with automatic stream recovery and comprehensive error handling.

features.title: Comprehensive Testing
features.description: Includes 33 automated tests covering all components: F-Engine channelisation accuracy, X-Engine correlation fidelity, geometric delay compensation precision, and end-to-end pipeline validation.

highlights: Implemented complete FX correlation pipeline with sub-picosecond delay precision and FFT accuracy validation
Designed dual-mode architecture separating development simulations from production telescope operations
Built containerised deployment using Docker for reproducible execution across Windows, Linux, and macOS
Developed comprehensive CLI with interactive shells for development and production modes
Created 33-test validation suite covering unit tests and integration tests for end-to-end pipeline verification
Implemented real-time network streaming with TCP/UDP support, configurable buffering, and production-grade monitoring
